Catalog/Cardiovascular
❤️

NexGen

NexGen Cobalt Chromium Coronary Stent System

NexGen by Meril • Cobalt Chromium

CardiovascularREF: NXG22508

Cobalt Chromium coronary stent system with hybrid design featuring open and closed cells for morphology mediated expansion, ultra-low strut thickness of 65μm, and tapered balloon shoulders for minimal edge injury

Technical Specifications

materialCobalt Chromium L605
strut thickness65 μm (0.065 mm or 0.0026")
diameters2.25, 2.50, 2.75, 3.00, 3.50, 4.00, 4.50 mm
lengths8, 13, 16, 19, 24, 29, 32, 37, 40 mm
mean recoil<4%
mean foreshortening0.29%
delivery systemRapid Exchange
crossing profile0.85-1.19 mm depending on diameter
nominal pressure9 atm
rated burst pressure14/16 atm
balloon overhang≤0.5 mm
shaft diameterProximal 1.95-1.98 F, Distal 2.7 F
radiopaque markers2 - Platinum/Iridium
catheter length140-142 cm
guide catheter compatibility5F (Min. I.D. 0.056"/1.42 mm)
max guide wire0.014" (0.36 mm)
ManufacturerMeril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd.
MaterialCobalt Chromium L605
